In Andhra Pradesh, the state government administration was operating in absolute overdrive to prepare for a highly unique, deeply prestigious diplomatic event: the confirmed inclusion of Hyderabad on US President Bill Clinton's impending state visit itinerary. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On March 16, 1968, during the massive, highly controversial Vietnam War, the horrific and deeply tragic My Lai Massacre occurred. A company of United States Army soldiers brutally and aggressively murdered between 300 and 500 unarmed South Vietnamese civilians, primarily women, children, and infants. The massive, deeply horrifying atrocity was heavily covered up by the military for a year before being exposed, aggressively fueling massive, global anti-war sentiment and deeply damaging the moral credibility of the United States.

On March 16, 1926, Robert Goddard, a massive, highly brilliant American engineer and physicist, achieved a monumental milestone in aerospace history. He successfully launched the absolute, very first liquid-fueled rocket in Auburn, Massachusetts. While the massive, historic flight only lasted 2.5 seconds and reached an altitude of 41 feet, it fundamentally proved the massive viability of liquid propulsion, laying the absolute, foundational groundwork for the massive rockets that would eventually launch humanity into space and to the Moon.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On March 16, 1901, P. B. Gajendragadkar, a massive, highly distinguished Indian jurist, was born in Maharashtra. He achieved massive, towering legal prominence by serving as the 7th Chief Justice of India. His massive, highly progressive judicial tenure heavily championed massive labor reforms and aggressively defended the fundamental rights enshrined in the Constitution, deeply shaping the massive, foundational jurisprudence of the early, independent Indian republic.

On March 16, 2001 (Historical context note), the highly controversial and massive "Tehelka tape" scandal was officially broken to the Indian public. A massive, deeply covert sting operation executed by the news portal *Tehelka* aggressively captured several high-ranking politicians and army officers on hidden cameras accepting massive bribes in a fake defense procurement deal. The massive, deeply shocking exposé heavily rocked the Vajpayee government, forcing the immediate resignation of the Defense Minister and triggering massive, nationwide political outrage.
